title: Review responsive layout across devices
description: Verify the changed UI adapts to screen sizes, orientation, safe areas, dynamic font scaling, and notches without clipping or overlap.
body: Steps: 1. Render the changed screen on a small phone, a large phone, and a tablet. 2. Rotate to landscape and back, checking for clipped or overlapping content. 3. Inset for safe areas/notches and the on-screen keyboard. 4. Increase the OS dynamic font/display size and confirm text reflows without truncation. 5. Record screenshots per configuration. Rollback point: before changing fixed dimensions to flexible ones. Validation: the layout adapts at every tested size and font scale with no clipping, overlap, or unreachable controls, evidenced by screenshots; a single-device check is not sufficient coverage.
